'''Bodrin''' was a rocky, mountainous [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector's]] [[Bodrin system/Legends|Bodrin system]] on the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]]. Its poor inhabitants worked for the [[Elrood Quarry Corporation]]. The [[bodrite]] [[Mining/Legends|mines]] operated at full capacity during the summer. During the five local winter months, the mines were forced to shut down. Individuals could not carry weapons on Bodrin, small towns were closely knit and crime was rare.<ref name="PotG3" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Bodrin lay within [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] space. The ''[[Shining Comet]]'' was headed to this planet with a group of [[Miner/Legends|miners]] when it was attacked by [[Consolidations Unlimited]].
